## Claims

1. CITATION.cff url and repository-code point to ImmortalDemonGod/bio-systems-engineering
2. No existing tests were modified or deleted during this change.
3. pyproject.toml [project.urls] all four entries point to ImmortalDemonGod/bio-systems-engineering
4. run_metrics raises ValueError when secs <= 0 instead of producing inf EF
5. run_metrics raises ValueError when avg_hr is NaN/zero instead of producing inf EF
6. run_metrics no longer adds zone_hr/zone_pace/zone_effective columns to the caller's DataFrame
7. parse_gpx skips trackpoints with missing or empty <time> element instead of raising AttributeError
8. parse_fit output DataFrame contains lat and lon columns in addition to latitude and longitude
9. FIT DataFrames can be passed to downstream functions expecting GPX-style lat/lon column names without KeyError
10. 12 tests cover parse_fit column renames, lat/lon aliases, semicircle conversion, NaN handling, and empty-file error
